path = '/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/ProjectTrendChart.tsx'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

t = '\t'

# === LineChart section ===
old1 = (
    f'{t*7}content={{({{ payload }}) => (\n'
    f'{t*8}<ChartLegend\n'
    f'{t*9}payload={{payload}}\n'
    f'{t*9}formatter={{formatProjectName}}\n'
    f'{t*9}hiddenSeries={{hiddenSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*9}onToggle={{toggleSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7})}}\n'
    f'{t*6}/>\n'
    f'{t*6}{{topProjects.map((projectPath, index) => (\n'
    f'{t*7}<Line\n'
    f'{t*8}key={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}type="monotone"\n'
    f'{t*8}dataKey={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}stroke={{PROJECT_COLORS[index % PROJECT_COLORS.length]}}\n'
)
new1 = (
    f'{t*7}content={{() => (\n'
    f'{t*8}<ChartLegend\n'
    f'{t*9}payload={{sortedLegendPayload}}\n'
    f'{t*9}formatter={{formatProjectName}}\n'
    f'{t*9}hiddenSeries={{hiddenSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*9}onToggle={{toggleSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7})}}\n'
    f'{t*6}/>\n'
    f'{t*6}{{topProjects.map((projectPath) => (\n'
    f'{t*7}<Line\n'
    f'{t*8}key={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}type="monotone"\n'
    f'{t*8}dataKey={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}stroke={{colorMap.get(projectPath) ?? OTHER_COLOR}}\n'
)
if old1 in content:
    content = content.replace(old1, new1, 1)
    print("LineChart section OK")
else:
    print("LineChart section NOT found")

# === BarChart Legend section ===
old2 = (
    f'{t*7}content={{({{ payload }}) => (\n'
    f'{t*8}<ChartLegend\n'
    f'{t*9}payload={{payload}}\n'
    f'{t*9}formatter={{formatProjectName}}\n'
    f'{t*9}hiddenSeries={{hiddenSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*9}onToggle={{toggleSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7})}}\n'
    f'{t*6}/>\n'
    f'{t*6}{{seriesList.map((projectPath, index) => (\n'
    f'{t*7}<Bar\n'
    f'{t*8}key={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}dataKey={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}stackId="1"\n'
    f'{t*8}hide={{hiddenSeries.has(projectPath)}}\n'
    f'{t*8}fill={{\n'
    f'{t*9}projectPath === "Other"\n'
    f'{t*10}? OTHER_COLOR\n'
    f'{t*10}: PROJECT_COLORS[index % PROJECT_COLORS.length]\n'
    f'{t*9}}}\n'
)
new2 = (
    f'{t*7}content={{() => (\n'
    f'{t*8}<ChartLegend\n'
    f'{t*9}payload={{sortedLegendPayload}}\n'
    f'{t*9}formatter={{formatProjectName}}\n'
    f'{t*9}hiddenSeries={{hiddenSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*9}onToggle={{toggleSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7})}}\n'
    f'{t*6}/>\n'
    f'{t*6}{{seriesList.map((projectPath) => (\n'
    f'{t*7}<Bar\n'
    f'{t*8}key={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}dataKey={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}stackId="1"\n'
    f'{t*8}hide={{hiddenSeries.has(projectPath)}}\n'
    f'{t*8}fill={{colorMap.get(projectPath) ?? OTHER_COLOR}}\n'
)
if old2 in content:
    content = content.replace(old2, new2, 1)
    print("BarChart section OK")
else:
    print("BarChart section NOT found")
    # Debug: show context around seriesList.map
    idx = content.find('seriesList.map')
    print(repr(content[idx-400:idx+200]))

with open(path, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF'
path = '/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/ProjectTrendChart.tsx'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

t = '\t'

# Fix BarChart Legend
old_legend = (
    f'{t*7}content={{({{ payload }}) => (\n'
    f'{t*8}<ChartLegend\n'
    f'{t*9}payload={{payload}}\n'
    f'{t*9}formatter={{formatProjectName}}\n'
    f'{t*9}hiddenSeries={{hiddenSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*9}onToggle={{toggleSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7})}}\n'
)
new_legend = (
    f'{t*7}content={{() => (\n'
    f'{t*8}<ChartLegend\n'
    f'{t*9}payload={{sortedLegendPayload}}\n'
    f'{t*9}formatter={{formatProjectName}}\n'
    f'{t*9}hiddenSeries={{hiddenSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*9}onToggle={{toggleSeries}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7})}}\n'
)
count = content.count(old_legend)
print(f"Found {count} occurrences of Legend pattern")
content = content.replace(old_legend, new_legend)

# Fix Bar map
old_bar = (
    f'{t*6}{{seriesList.map((projectPath, index) => (\n'
    f'{t*7}<Bar\n'
    f'{t*8}key={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}dataKey={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}stackId="1"\n'
    f'{t*8}hide={{hiddenSeries.has(projectPath)}}\n'
    f'{t*8}fill={{\n'
    f'{t*9}projectPath === "Other"\n'
    f'{t*10}? OTHER_COLOR\n'
    f'{t*10}: PROJECT_COLORS[index % PROJECT_COLORS.length]\n'
    f'{t*9}}}\n'
    f'{t*8}/>\n'
    f'{t*7}))}\n'
)
new_bar = (
    f'{t*6}{{seriesList.map((projectPath) => (\n'
    f'{t*7}<Bar\n'
    f'{t*8}key={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}dataKey={{projectPath}}\n'
    f'{t*8}stackId="1"\n'
    f'{t*8}hide={{hiddenSeries.has(projectPath)}}\n'
    f'{t*8}fill={{colorMap.get(projectPath) ?? OTHER_COLOR}}\n'
    f'{t*7}/>\n'
    f'{t*6}))}\n'
)
count2 = content.count(old_bar)
print(f"Found {count2} occurrences of Bar pattern")
if count2 == 0:
    # debug: find seriesList.map context
    idx = content.find('seriesList.map')
    print(repr(content[idx-10:idx+400]))
content = content.replace(old_bar, new_bar)

with open(path, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
print("Done")

path = '/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/DeveloperTrendChart.tsx'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

t = '\t'

# 1. Add colorMap after topDevelopers useMemo (after "}, [data]);")
old_after_top = (t + '}, [data]);\n\n' +
                 t + 'const { chartData, seriesList }')
new_after_top = (t + '}, [data]);\n\n' +
                 t + 'const colorMap = useMemo(() => {\n' +
                 t*2 + 'const map = new Map<string, string>();\n' +
                 t*2 + 'topDevelopers.forEach((u, i) =>\n' +
                 t*3 + 'map.set(u, DEVELOPER_COLORS[i % DEVELOPER_COLORS.length]),\n' +
                 t*2 + ');\n' +
                 t*2 + 'map.set("Other", OTHER_COLOR);\n' +
                 t*2 + 'return map;\n' +
                 t + '}, [topDevelopers]);\n\n' +
                 t + 'const { chartData, seriesList }')

count = content.count(old_after_top)
print(f"colorMap insertion point: {count}")
content = content.replace(old_after_top, new_after_top, 1)

# 2. Add sortedLegendPayload after chartData useMemo (before "const formatUsername")
old_after_chart = (t + '], [data, topDevelopers, topDevelopersSet, hasOther, selectedMetric, currentMetric]);\n\n' +
                   t + 'const formatUsername')
if old_after_chart not in content:
    # Try multiline version
    old_after_chart = (t + '], [\n' +
                       t*2 + 'data,\n' +
                       t*2 + 'topDevelopers,\n' +
                       t*2 + 'topDevelopersSet,\n' +
                       t*2 + 'hasOther,\n' +
                       t*2 + 'selectedMetric,\n' +
                       t*2 + 'currentMetric,\n' +
                       t + ']);\n\n' +
                       t + 'const formatUsername')
new_after_chart = (t + '], [\n' +
                   t*2 + 'data,\n' +
                   t*2 + 'topDevelopers,\n' +
                   t*2 + 'topDevelopersSet,\n' +
                   t*2 + 'hasOther,\n' +
                   t*2 + 'selectedMetric,\n' +
                   t*2 + 'currentMetric,\n' +
                   t + ']);\n\n' +
                   t + 'const sortedLegendPayload = useMemo(() => {\n' +
                   t*2 + 'const totals = new Map<string, number>();\n' +
                   t*2 + 'for (const row of chartData) {\n' +
                   t*3 + 'for (const key of seriesList) {\n' +
                   t*4 + 'totals.set(key, (totals.get(key) ?? 0) + ((row[key] as number) ?? 0));\n' +
                   t*3 + '}\n' +
                   t*2 + '}\n' +
                   t*2 + 'return [...seriesList]\n' +
                   t*3 + '.sort((a, b) => (totals.get(b) ?? 0) - (totals.get(a) ?? 0))\n' +
                   t*3 + '.map((key) => ({\n' +
                   t*4 + 'value: key,\n' +
                   t*4 + 'color: colorMap.get(key) ?? OTHER_COLOR,\n' +
                   t*4 + 'type: "square" as const,\n' +
                   t*3 + '}));\n' +
                   t + '}, [chartData, seriesList, colorMap]);\n\n' +
                   t + 'const formatUsername')

count2 = content.count(old_after_chart)
print(f"sortedLegendPayload insertion point: {count2}")
content = content.replace(old_after_chart, new_after_chart, 1)

# 3. Fix LineChart Legend + Line map
old_line_legend = (t*7 + 'content={({ payload }) => (\n' +
                   t*8 + '<ChartLegend\n' +
                   t*9 + 'payload={payload}\n' +
                   t*9 + 'formatter={formatUsername}\n' +
                   t*9 + 'hiddenSeries={hiddenSeries}\n' +
                   t*9 + 'onToggle={toggleSeries}\n' +
                   t*8 + '/>\n' +
                   t*7 + ')}\n' +
                   t*6 + '/>\n' +
                   t*6 + '{topDevelopers.map((userId, index) => (\n' +
                   t*7 + '<Line\n' +
                   t*8 + 'key={userId}\n' +
                   t*8 + 'type="monotone"\n' +
                   t*8 + 'dataKey={userId}\n' +
                   t*8 + 'stroke={DEVELOPER_COLORS[index % DEVELOPER_COLORS.length]}\n')
new_line_legend = (t*7 + 'content={() => (\n' +
                   t*8 + '<ChartLegend\n' +
                   t*9 + 'payload={sortedLegendPayload}\n' +
                   t*9 + 'formatter={formatUsername}\n' +
                   t*9 + 'hiddenSeries={hiddenSeries}\n' +
                   t*9 + 'onToggle={toggleSeries}\n' +
                   t*8 + '/>\n' +
                   t*7 + ')}\n' +
                   t*6 + '/>\n' +
                   t*6 + '{topDevelopers.map((userId) => (\n' +
                   t*7 + '<Line\n' +
                   t*8 + 'key={userId}\n' +
                   t*8 + 'type="monotone"\n' +
                   t*8 + 'dataKey={userId}\n' +
                   t*8 + 'stroke={colorMap.get(userId) ?? OTHER_COLOR}\n')
count3 = content.count(old_line_legend)
print(f"Line legend: {count3}")
content = content.replace(old_line_legend, new_line_legend, 1)

# 4. Fix BarChart Legend
old_bar_legend = (t*7 + 'content={({ payload }) => (\n' +
                  t*8 + '<ChartLegend\n' +
                  t*9 + 'payload={payload}\n' +
                  t*9 + 'formatter={formatUsername}\n' +
                  t*9 + 'hiddenSeries={hiddenSeries}\n' +
                  t*9 + 'onToggle={toggleSeries}\n' +
                  t*8 + '/>\n' +
                  t*7 + ')}\n')
new_bar_legend = (t*7 + 'content={() => (\n' +
                  t*8 + '<ChartLegend\n' +
                  t*9 + 'payload={sortedLegendPayload}\n' +
                  t*9 + 'formatter={formatUsername}\n' +
                  t*9 + 'hiddenSeries={hiddenSeries}\n' +
                  t*9 + 'onToggle={toggleSeries}\n' +
                  t*8 + '/>\n' +
                  t*7 + ')}\n')
count4 = content.count(old_bar_legend)
print(f"Bar legend: {count4}")
content = content.replace(old_bar_legend, new_bar_legend)

# 5. Fix Bar map
idx = content.find('userId.map')
idx2 = content.find('seriesList.map((userId')
print(f"seriesList.map found at: {idx2}")
if idx2 >= 0:
    print(repr(content[idx2-2:idx2+300]))

old_bar_map = (t*6 + '{seriesList.map((userId, index) => (\n' +
               t*7 + '<Bar\n' +
               t*8 + 'key={userId}\n' +
               t*8 + 'dataKey={userId}\n' +
               t*8 + 'stackId="1"\n' +

new_bar_map = (t*6 + '{seriesList.map((userId) => (\n' +

path = '/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/ErrorTrendChart.tsx'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

t = '\t'

# Find the useMemo hook that computes seriesKeys/chartData
# We'll add stableColorOrder and colorMap useMemos BEFORE the existing useMemo
# and a sortedLegendPayload useMemo AFTER it

# Find insertion point before the existing useMemo
idx = content.find('\tconst { seriesKeys, chartData } = useMemo(')
print(f"useMemo found at: {idx}")
print(repr(content[idx-5:idx+50]))

# Insert stableColorOrder and colorMap before the existing useMemo
insert_before = '\tconst { seriesKeys, chartData } = useMemo('
stable_color_block = (
    t + 'const stableColorOrder = useMemo(() => {\n' +
    t*2 + 'if (data.length === 0) return [];\n' +
    t*2 + 'const totals = new Map<string, number>();\n' +
    t*2 + 'for (const item of data) {\n' +
    t*3 + 'totals.set(item.dimension, (totals.get(item.dimension) ?? 0) + item.total_errors);\n' +
    t*2 + '}\n' +
    t*2 + 'return [...totals.entries()]\n' +
    t*3 + '.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])\n' +
    t*3 + '.slice(0, MAX_SERIES)\n' +
    t*3 + '.map(([k]) => k);\n' +
    t + '}, [data]);\n\n' +
    t + 'const colorMap = useMemo(() => {\n' +
    t*2 + 'const map = new Map<string, string>();\n' +
    t*2 + 'stableColorOrder.forEach((k, i) => map.set(k, COLORS[i % COLORS.length]));\n' +
    t*2 + 'map.set("Other", OTHER_COLOR);\n' +
    t*2 + 'return map;\n' +
    t + '}, [stableColorOrder]);\n\n'
)
content = content.replace(insert_before, stable_color_block + insert_before, 1)

# Now find the end of the existing useMemo to insert sortedLegendPayload after it
# The useMemo ends with "}, [data, metric]);"
old_after_memo = t + '}, [data, metric]);\n\n' + t + 'const getDisplayName'
new_after_memo = (t + '}, [data, metric]);\n\n' +
                  t + 'const sortedLegendPayload = useMemo(() => {\n' +
                  t*2 + 'return seriesKeys.map((key) => ({\n' +
                  t*3 + 'value: key,\n' +
                  t*3 + 'color: colorMap.get(key) ?? COLORS[0],\n' +
                  t*3 + 'type: "square" as const,\n' +
                  t*2 + '}));\n' +
                  t + '}, [seriesKeys, colorMap]);\n\n' +
                  t + 'const getDisplayName')
count = content.count(old_after_memo)
print(f"After memo insertion: {count}")
content = content.replace(old_after_memo, new_after_memo, 1)

with open(path, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
print("Step 1 done")

path = '/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx'
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

t = '\t'

# Find the line after rawSplitKeys is constructed
# current: const rawSplitKeys = Array.from(allSplitValues);
# We want to add sort logic after this line
old = (t*3 + 'const rawSplitKeys = Array.from(allSplitValues);\n' +
       t*3 + '// Map raw split keys to display names')
new = (t*3 + 'const rawSplitKeys = Array.from(allSplitValues);\n' +
       t*3 + '// Sort split keys by total raw value descending\n' +
       t*3 + 'const splitKeyTotals = new Map<string, number>();\n' +
       t*3 + 'for (const item of data) {\n' +
       t*4 + 'for (const key of rawSplitKeys) {\n' +
       t*5 + 'splitKeyTotals.set(key, (splitKeyTotals.get(key) ?? 0) + (item.split_values?.[key] || 0));\n' +
       t*4 + '}\n' +
       t*3 + '}\n' +
       t*3 + 'rawSplitKeys.sort((a, b) => (splitKeyTotals.get(b) ?? 0) - (splitKeyTotals.get(a) ?? 0));\n' +
       t*3 + '// Map raw split keys to display names')

count = content.count(old)
print(f"Found: {count}")
content = content.replace(old, new, 1)

with open(path, 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
print("Done")

files_patterns = [
    ('/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/ProjectTrendChart.tsx',
     'topProjects.forEach((p, i) =>\n\t\t\tmap.set(p, PROJECT_COLORS[i % PROJECT_COLORS.length]),\n\t\t);',
     'for (let i = 0; i < topProjects.length; i++) {\n\t\t\tmap.set(topProjects[i], PROJECT_COLORS[i % PROJECT_COLORS.length]);\n\t\t}'),
    ('/Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/apps/web/src/components/charts/DeveloperTrendChart.tsx',

]

content.text: All 11 tasks pass. Let me do a quick sanity check on the key parts of each modified file:

input.description: Verify new variables appear in all 4 files

content.text:
All changes are in place and `bun run verify` passes. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**ProjectTrendChart & DeveloperTrendChart:**
- Added `colorMap` (stable, keyed by sessions rank) — colors never shift when switching metrics
- Added `sortedLegendPayload` — sorted by current metric totals, colors pulled from `colorMap`
- Bar/Line elements now use `colorMap.get(key)` instead of index-based colors
- Legend ignores recharts' auto-generated `payload` and uses `sortedLegendPayload` directly

**ErrorTrendChart:**
- Added `stableColorOrder` — ranked by `total_errors` once, independent of the active metric
- Added `colorMap` derived from `stableColorOrder` — colors stay fixed when switching between Total/Avg metrics
- `seriesKeys` still sorts by active metric (correct legend order), but colors come from `colorMap`
- Added `sortedLegendPayload` mapping `seriesKeys` → stable colors

**DimensionAnalysisChart:**
- After collecting `rawSplitKeys` from Set iteration, now sorts them by total raw value descending — deterministic legend order based on magnitude rather than insertion order

content.content: Launching skill: pr-creation

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /Users/rafa/Obsession/rudel/.claude/skills/pr-creation

# PR Creation Checklist

Follow these steps in order when creating a pull request. Do not skip any step.

## 1. Run Verification

```bash
bun run verify
```

This runs type checking, linting, and tests across the monorepo.

**Do NOT proceed if verification fails.** Fix issues first, then re-run.

## 2. Review the Workspace Diff

Use `mcp__conductor__GetWorkspaceDiff` with `stat: true` to see all changed files, then review the full diff to understand the scope of changes.

## 3. Commit All Changes

Stage and commit all changes. Follow any user instructions about commit message style.

## 4. Push and Create PR

1. Push to origin with `-u` flag if the branch has no upstream
2. PR title **must** use conventional commit format (enforced by CI):
   `feat:` | `fix:` | `docs:` | `style:` | `refactor:` | `perf:` | `test:` | `build:` | `ci:` | `chore:` | `revert:`
3. Use `gh pr create --base main` with:
   - Title under 80 characters
   - Description covering ALL changes in the workspace diff (not just the latest commit)
   - Keep description concise

```bash
gh pr create --base main --title "title here" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- bullet points describing changes

## Test plan
- [ ] testing steps

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
```

## Common Mistakes to Avoid

- **Skipping verification**: Step 1 is non-negotiable. CI will catch the same failures but slower.
- **Wrong PR title format**: Must be conventional commit format or CI will reject it.
- **Describing only the latest commit**: The PR description should cover the entire branch diff.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(web): stable chart colors and metric-sorted legends

- Add colorMap (keyed by stable rank) to ProjectTrendChart and
  DeveloperTrendChart so colors never shift when switching metrics
- Add sortedLegendPayload to all trend charts so the legend always
  shows the highest-total series at the top for the selected metric
- Fix ErrorTrendChart: color assignment now based on total_errors rank
  (stable), independent of the active avg/total metric selector
- Fix DimensionAnalysisChart: sort split_by keys by total raw value
  descending instead of non-deterministic Set insertion order
- Add ChartTooltip component and migrate LearningsTrendChart,
  ModelTokensChart, and UsageTrendChart to use it for consistent hover UX

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --title "feat(web): stable chart colors and metric-sorted legends" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Stable colors**: `ProjectTrendChart`, `DeveloperTrendChart` — added `colorMap` keyed by sessions rank so colors never shift when switching between Sessions/Hours/Tokens/Success Rate metrics
- **Stable colors**: `ErrorTrendChart` — color assignment now based on `total_errors` rank (computed once), independent of the active avg/total metric selector; switching metrics no longer reassigns colors
- **Metric-sorted legends**: all four trend charts now show a `sortedLegendPayload` where the highest-total series for the *currently selected metric* appears at the top; recharts' auto-generated payload is ignored
- **Deterministic split order**: `DimensionAnalysisChart` — split-by keys were previously in non-deterministic Set insertion order; now sorted by total raw value descending
- **ChartTooltip component**: added shared `ChartTooltip` and migrated `LearningsTrendChart`, `ModelTokensChart`, and `UsageTrendChart` to use it for consistent hover UX across all charts

## Test plan
- [ ] ProjectTrendChart: select Tokens → legend reorders to highest-token project at top; switch back to Sessions → order reverts; colors stay the same throughout
- [ ] ErrorTrendChart: switch from Total Errors → Avg per Session → legend reorders but each project/model keeps its color
- [ ] DimensionAnalysis: select a split-by dimension → legend items appear sorted by highest value at top
- [ ] Hover tooltips on LearningsTrend, ModelTokens, UsageTrend charts render consistently

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
